nameMeanings.name: mantell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Asher, Elihu, Yetta.
English (southern) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Mantel  . The historic English pronunciation has the stress on the first syllable, more recently on the second.
Americanized form of German, French, and Dutch   Mantel  .

variants.name: Mantel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Menachem, Shlomo.

English, German, French, and Dutch: nickname for someone who wore a cloak in a particularly conspicuous way or with a striking design, from Middle English, Middle High German, Old French, and Middle Dutch mantel ‘cloak, coat’ (from Late Latin mantellus). It may sometimes have named a cloak maker.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably from German Mantel or Yiddish mantl ‘coat’; see 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry mantell was born in 1440, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Walter Martell, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Abbot, was 26. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1485, in Nether Heyford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry mantell(이)가 1440년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Martell(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Abbot(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 네터 헤이퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.
